Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Understanding the Go Runtime: The Scheduler 126 upvotes, 16 comments
  2. Gvisor on Raspbian 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. The Met releases high-def 3D scans of 140 famous art objects 306 upvotes, 60 comments
  4. IMG_0416 (2024) 123 upvotes, 24 comments
  5. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 53 upvotes, 8 comments
  6. Prefix sums at gigabytes per second with ARM NEON 52 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 160 upvotes, 40 comments
  8. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 357 upvotes, 105 comments
  9. I traced $2B in grants and 45 states' lobbying behind age‑verification bills 313 upvotes, 93 comments
  10. Vite 8.0 Is Out 369 upvotes, 112 comments
  11. Shall I implement it? No 1354 upvotes, 493 comments
  12. Malus – Clean Room as a Service 1324 upvotes, 482 comments
  13. Willingness to look stupid 446 upvotes, 155 comments
  14. Celebrating Interesting Flickr Technologies 50 upvotes, 11 comments
  15. “This is not the computer for you” 586 upvotes, 238 comments
  16. Ceno, browse the web without internet access 58 upvotes, 18 comments
  17. Enhancing gut-brain communication reversed cognitive decline in aging mice 328 upvotes, 145 comments
  18. Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources 130 upvotes, 53 comments
  19. Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead 154 upvotes, 70 comments
  20. What we learned from a 22-Day storage bug (and how we fixed it) 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025) 24 upvotes, 8 comments
  22. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 45 upvotes, 20 comments
  23. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 215 upvotes, 138 comments
  24. Prompt-caching – auto-injects Anthropic cache breakpoints (90% token savings) 29 upvotes, 14 comments
  25. Source code of Swedish e-government services has been leaked 107 upvotes, 85 comments
  26. ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 451 upvotes, 465 comments
  27. Show HN: fftool – A Terminal UI for FFmpeg – Shows Command Before It Runs 25 upvotes, 16 comments
  28. US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says 393 upvotes, 431 comments
  29. Show HN: Algorithms and Data Structures in TypeScript – Free Book (~400 Pages) 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. Grief and the AI split 172 upvotes, 278 comments

Last generated 9:00pm, 13 March 2026. Source here.
